zh-CN.title: 我的空间
zh-CN.hero.name: 武浩
zh-CN.hero.typing: AI 算法工程师 / C++高性能计算 / 终身探索者
zh-CN.about.title: / 关于我
zh-CN.about.p1: AI 算法研发工程师，深耕于深度学习、大语言模型与高性能计算。擅长使用 C++ 和 Python 构建高吞吐、低延迟的模型推理与计算系统。
zh-CN.about.p2: 在 CUDA 并行计算、TensorRT 模型编译部署及多模态大模型应用有丰富实践。追求极致的计算性能与优雅的代码架构，持续探索人工智能边界。
zh-CN.pipeline.title: / 全流程能力
zh-CN.pipeline.intro: 从数据构建到线上运维闭环，覆盖大模型训练、评测、部署与持续优化。
zh-CN.pipeline.step1.title: 数据工程
zh-CN.pipeline.step1.desc: 构建清洗、去重、指令构造与质检流程，形成可复用训练语料资产。
zh-CN.pipeline.step1.outcome: 结果：样本有效率与数据覆盖率可量化追踪
zh-CN.pipeline.step2.title: 训练与对齐
zh-CN.pipeline.step2.desc: 负责 SFT、参数高效微调与对齐策略迭代，平衡效果与训练成本。
zh-CN.pipeline.step2.outcome: 结果：训练收敛曲线与成本曲线可复现
zh-CN.pipeline.step3.title: 评测与迭代
zh-CN.pipeline.step3.desc: 建立离线评测集和人工评审标准，持续压低幻觉率并提升稳健性。
zh-CN.pipeline.step3.outcome: 结果：关键质量指标按版本连续对比
zh-CN.pipeline.step4.title: 推理部署
zh-CN.pipeline.step4.desc: 完成量化、图优化与服务化封装，支撑高并发低延迟推理场景。
zh-CN.pipeline.step4.outcome: 结果：P95 延迟、吞吐与资源利用率可观测
zh-CN.pipeline.step5.title: 线上运维
zh-CN.pipeline.step5.desc: 接入监控告警与灰度发布，打通反馈数据回流与周期性再训练。
zh-CN.pipeline.step5.outcome: 结果：线上质量与稳定性可持续改进
zh-CN.skills.title: / 技能
zh-CN.gallery.title: / 影像
zh-CN.projects.title: / 项目
zh-CN.projects.item1.title: 高性能神经网络推理引擎
zh-CN.projects.item1.desc: 基于 C++ 和 CUDA 编写的极致推理加速引擎，支持模型剪枝、INT8 量化及算子融合，极其轻量低延迟。
zh-CN.projects.item2.title: 多模态大模型智能体平台
zh-CN.projects.item2.desc: 结合 RAG（检索增强生成）与高吞吐算子优化的离线 AI 助手系统，利用 Python 及自定义 C++ 算子加速。
zh-CN.contact.title: / 联系

en.title: My Space
en.hero.name: Wu Hao
en.hero.typing: AI R&D Engineer / C++ High-Performance Computing / Lifelong Explorer
en.about.title: / About
en.about.p1: AI Algorithm Engineer specialized in Deep Learning, Large Language Models, and High-Performance Computing. Skilled in designing high-throughput, low-latency inference and compute engines using C++ and Python.
en.about.p2: Deep hands-on experience in CUDA parallel programming, TensorRT compiler optimizations, and Multimodal LLMs. Dedicated to squeezing maximum computing power through clean, elegant software architectures.
en.pipeline.title: / End-to-End Pipeline
en.pipeline.intro: Covers the full lifecycle from data engineering to production operations: training, evaluation, deployment, and continuous optimization.
en.pipeline.step1.title: Data Engineering
en.pipeline.step1.desc: Built cleaning, deduplication, instruction construction, and quality-control pipelines for reusable training datasets.
en.pipeline.step1.outcome: Result: sample validity and coverage become measurable
en.pipeline.step2.title: Training and Alignment
en.pipeline.step2.desc: Owned SFT and parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategies, balancing model quality with compute budget.
en.pipeline.step2.outcome: Result: convergence and cost curves are reproducible
en.pipeline.step3.title: Evaluation and Iteration
en.pipeline.step3.desc: Designed offline benchmarks and human-review standards to reduce hallucinations and improve robustness.
en.pipeline.step3.outcome: Result: quality KPIs are tracked across versions
en.pipeline.step4.title: Inference Deployment
en.pipeline.step4.desc: Delivered quantization, graph optimization, and service packaging for high-throughput low-latency inference.
en.pipeline.step4.outcome: Result: P95 latency, throughput, and utilization are observable
en.pipeline.step5.title: Production Operations
en.pipeline.step5.desc: Implemented monitoring, alerting, and canary rollout with feedback loops for periodic retraining.
en.pipeline.step5.outcome: Result: online stability and quality improve continuously
en.skills.title: / Skills
en.gallery.title: / Gallery
en.projects.title: / Projects
en.projects.item1.title: High-Performance Neural Inference Engine
en.projects.item1.desc: A customized inference accelerator written in C++ & CUDA, utilizing model pruning, INT8 quantization, and kernel fusion to slash latency.
en.projects.item2.title: Multimodal LLM Agent Framework
en.projects.item2.desc: A localized LLM Agent workspace integrating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and optimized with Python and custom C++ CUDA-kernels.
en.contact.title: / Contact
